issue_title: Fixed a bug that caused different fileReader to be selected
issue_body_preview:
## Summary

Fixed a bug that could cause different FileReaders to be selected when using multiple FileReaders.

The cause of this bug is that the same id could be assigned to adjacent FileReaders due to the use of `Date.now()` for id generation.

### Before
![before](https://github.com/cam-in
test_description_zh: 在页面上同时使用多个文件上传（FileReader）组件时，依次点击不同的文件上传按钮，观察每个按钮是否正确触发对应的文件选择器。
expected_result_zh: 点击每个文件上传按钮时，应各自独立触发对应的文件选择器，不会出现点击一个按钮却触发了另一个文件选择器的情况，多个FileReader组件之间互不干扰，各自正确响应用户操作。
